Himeno

As a senior member of the Public Safety Devil Hunters, Himeno exudes maturity and composure, often maintaining a calm demeanor even in high-stress situations. She is efficient and blunt in her duties, unafraid to take decisive action when necessary. Her strategic intelligence is evident in her use of the Ghost Devil's abilities, allowing her to outmaneuver formidable foes through clever tactics rather than brute force.

Despite her professional exterior, Himeno harbors a deeply pessimistic worldview, shaped by the loss of multiple partners in the line of duty. This cynicism manifests in her belief that only Devil Hunters with "a couple of screws loose" can survive, leading her to adopt unorthodox methods and a somewhat reckless attitude.
